description: Brand voice validation rules for Carisma Slimming

forbidden_phrases.pattern: lack of discipline|willpower|lazy|undisciplined|you let yourself go|fix your body
forbidden_phrases.suggestion: Use: 'You didn't fail; the plan failed you' or 'Let's find an approach that works with your life'

forbidden_phrases.pattern: just love yourself|positive thinking fixes|if you really wanted to|stop making excuses
forbidden_phrases.suggestion: Use: 'Acknowledge the hard parts. Here's how we'll navigate them together' or 'Your struggle is real; here's the science'

forbidden_phrases.pattern: lose 10kg in 10 days|drop weight fast|rapid results|guaranteed|works for everyone
forbidden_phrases.suggestion: Use: 'Sustainable weight loss of 5-10kg in a medically supervised program' or 'Results vary; we personalize for you'

forbidden_phrases.pattern: you will get sick if you don't|ticking time bomb|your health is failing|last chance
forbidden_phrases.reason: Fear-mongering (creates shame and urgency, not empowerment)
forbidden_phrases.suggestion: Use: 'Reclaim your energy' or 'Feel like yourself again' or 'Your health matters; let's invest in it now'

forbidden_phrases.pattern: only discuss kilos|focus on weight|measure by size|BMI is everything
forbidden_phrases.reason: Reducing person to numbers (ignores holistic transformation)
forbidden_phrases.suggestion: Include: How life feels (energy, stairs, health, confidence, clothes fit) alongside weight metrics

forbidden_phrases.pattern: summer body|beach ready|get thin by|quick fix for the wedding
forbidden_phrases.reason: Fleeting urgency framing (contradicts sustainable, self-focused approach)
forbidden_phrases.suggestion: Use: 'Build the life you want to live in your body' or 'Long-term confidence, not deadline panic'

forbidden_phrases.pattern: one-size-fits-all|everyone should|do what I did|follow the rules exactly
forbidden_phrases.reason: Generic/impersonal (ignores personalization, individual needs, life complexity)
forbidden_phrases.suggestion: Use: 'Your plan adapts to weekends, stress, real life' or 'Designed around your unique needs'

forbidden_phrases.pattern: calories in calories out|it's simple if you try|just eat less|no excuses
forbidden_phrases.reason: Oversimplification (ignores hormones, metabolism, stress, life factors)
forbidden_phrases.suggestion: Use: 'Science-backed approach to your unique metabolism' or 'Hormones, stress, and real life matter'

validation_words: you are not the only one

validation_rules.name: check_forbidden_phrases
validation_rules.description: Reject messages with shame/blame, toxic positivity, fear-mongering, or over-promises

validation_rules.name: check_validation_presence
validation_rules.description: Warn if message lacks validation of struggle/experience
validation_rules.threshold: For messages about weight loss or difficulty, include at least one validation word (real, understand, not alone, etc.)

validation_rules.name: check_holistic_framing
validation_rules.description: Warn if message only discusses weight/kilos without feeling words
validation_rules.threshold: When discussing results/transformation, include feeling words (energy, confidence, stairs, move) alongside weight metrics

validation_rules.name: check_empowerment_tone
validation_rules.description: Recommend empowerment language for customer-facing messages
validation_rules.threshold: For customer communications, include at least one empowerment word (you choose, your power, capable, etc.)

validation_rules.name: check_science_backing
validation_rules.description: For claims about metabolism/results, ensure evidence-led language
validation_rules.threshold: Any claim about why something works should reference science, data, or medical backing

feedback_templates.missing_validation:
Tone Tip
Try validating their struggle first:
Example: "Your struggle is real. Here's what science shows..."
feedback_templates.only_numbers:
Tone Tip
Beyond the numbers, how will they FEEL?
Example: "You'll lose weight AND have the energy to climb stairs without thinking about it."
feedback_templates.missing_empowerment:
Tone Tip
Empower them with choice:
Example: "You choose what you eat. We show you how to make it work."
feedback_templates.missing_science:
Professional Tip
When explaining why something works, anchor in science:
Example: "Your hormones matter. Here is the data on how we account for that."

conciseness_rules.description: Enforce concise, human-like responses. Advisory only — agent may override with reason.

rules.name: list_formatting
rules.description: If listing 3 or more items, use bullet points or numbered list

feedback_templates.word_count_warning:
Conciseness Check
Your response is {word_count} words. Keep it under 150.

Tips:
• Lead with the answer
• Cut filler words
• One idea per sentence

Override? (Y/N)
feedback_templates.sentence_count_warning:
Conciseness Check
Your response has {sentence_count} sentences. Aim for 4-6.

Quick fix:
• Combine related ideas
• Remove nice-to-haves
• One idea per sentence

Override? (Y/N)
feedback_templates.list_formatting_warning:
Format Tip
You listed {item_count} items in paragraph form. Use bullets:
• Cleaner to read
• Easier to scan
• More readable on mobile

Override? (Y/N)
feedback_templates.ai_voice_warning:
Tone Check
Found: "{phrase}"
This sounds like AI. Remove it and speak directly.

Instead:
• State the answer plainly
• Use 'you' language
• Sound like a real person

Override? (Y/N)

_notes.adaptation_for_other_brands: To adapt for other brands, change 'brand' field and customize forbidden_phrases and required_tone_markers for each brand's psychological risks and values.
_notes.shame_vs_motivation: Never use shame as a motivator. Instead, use compassion + evidence. Shame leads to relapse and abandonment.
_notes.holistic_over_numeric: Weight is one metric. Include energy, confidence, health, life transformation to avoid reinforcing scale-obsessed thinking that damages mental health.
_notes.validation_as_retention: Validating struggle upfront builds trust and retention. Generic or blame-focused messaging causes drop-off.
_notes.personalization_as_respect: Every woman's body, life, and journey is different. Emphasizing personalization (not one-size-fits-all) shows respect and increases adherence.
